mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, org_id, display_name, avatar_url, real_name, job_title, education_level, graduated_school, major, years_of_experience, special_countries, special_directions, bio, service_style_tags, public_status, verified_badge_status, profile_audit_status, status FROM agency_member_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, org_id, display_name, avatar_url, real_name, job_title, education_level, graduated_school, major, years_of_experience, special_countries, special_directions, bio, service_style_tags, public_status, verified_badge_status, profile_audit_status, status FROM agency_member_profile WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, org_id, display_name, avatar_url, real_name, job_title, education_level, graduated_school, major, years_of_experience, special_countries, special_directions, bio, service_style_tags, public_status, verified_badge_status, profile_audit_status, status FROM agency_member_profile WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, org_id, display_name, avatar_url, real_name, job_title, education_level, graduated_school, major, years_of_experience, special_countries, special_directions, bio, service_style_tags, public_status, verified_badge_status, profile_audit_status, status FROM agency_member_profile WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.user_id AS userId, ua.phone AS phone, m.display_name AS displayName, m.job_title AS jobTitle, m.education_level AS educationLevel, m.graduated_school AS graduatedSchool, m.years_of_experience AS yearsOfExperience, m.public_status AS publicStatus, m.verified_badge_status AS verifiedBadgeStatus, m.profile_audit_status AS profileAuditStatus, m.status AS memberStatus, ua.status AS accountStatus FROM agency_member_profile m JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id WHERE m.org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY m.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE agency_member_profile SET display_name = #{displayName}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, real_name = #{realName}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, education_level = #{educationLevel}, graduated_school = #{graduatedSchool}, major = #{major}, years_of_experience = #{yearsOfExperience}, special_countries = #{specialCountries}, special_directions = #{specialDirections}, bio = #{bio}, service_style_tags = #{serviceStyleTags}, public_status = #{publicStatus}, verified_badge_status = #{verifiedBadgeStatus}, profile_audit_status = #{profileAuditStatus} WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE agency_member_profile SET display_name = #{displayName}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, education_level = #{educationLevel}, graduated_school = #{graduatedSchool}, major = #{major}, years_of_experience = #{yearsOfExperience}, special_countries = #{specialCountries}, special_directions = #{specialDirections}, bio = #{bio}, service_style_tags = #{serviceStyleTags}, public_status = #{publicStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.display_name AS displayName, m.job_title AS jobTitle, COALESCE(pr.role_code, '') AS primaryRole, o.org_name AS orgName, t.team_name AS teamName, o.city AS city, m.bio AS bio, m.special_countries AS specialCountries, m.special_directions AS specialDirections, m.years_of_experience AS yearsOfExperience, m.education_level AS educationLevel, COALESCE(mm.case_count, 0) AS caseCount, COALESCE(mm.success_rate, 0) AS successRate, COALESCE(mm.avg_rating, 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(mm.response_efficiency_score, 0) AS responseEfficiencyScore, mm.service_tags AS serviceTags, mm.budget_tags AS budgetTags, m.verified_badge_status AS verifiedBadgeStatus, o.logo_url AS logoUrl FROM agency_member_profile m JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = m.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_member_rel tm ON tm.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN agency_team t ON t.id = tm.team_id LEFT JOIN agency_member_role_rel pr ON pr.member_id = m.id AND pr.is_primary = 1 AND pr.role_status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_metrics mm ON mm.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = m.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'AGENT_REAL_NAME' LEFT JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = m.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'AGENT_EDUCATION' WHERE m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' AND o.status = 'ACTIVE' AND o.verification_status = 'APPROVED' AND vrn.status = 'APPROVED' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM agency_member_role_rel rr WHERE rr.member_id = m.id AND rr.role_code = #{roleCode} AND rr.role_status = 'ACTIVE' )
AND m.special_countries LIKE CONCAT('%', #{country}, '%')
AND m.special_directions LIKE CONCAT('%', #{direction}, '%')
AND o.city = #{city}
AND mm.service_tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{serviceTag}, '%')
AND mm.budget_tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{budgetTag}, '%')
ORDER BY mm.avg_rating DESC, mm.success_rate DESC, mm.case_count DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.display_name AS displayName, m.job_title AS jobTitle, COALESCE(pr.role_code, '') AS primaryRole, o.org_name AS orgName, t.team_name AS teamName, o.city AS city, m.bio AS bio, m.special_countries AS specialCountries, m.special_directions AS specialDirections, m.years_of_experience AS yearsOfExperience, m.education_level AS educationLevel, COALESCE(mm.case_count, 0) AS caseCount, COALESCE(mm.success_rate, 0) AS successRate, COALESCE(mm.avg_rating, 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(mm.response_efficiency_score, 0) AS responseEfficiencyScore, mm.service_tags AS serviceTags, mm.budget_tags AS budgetTags, m.verified_badge_status AS verifiedBadgeStatus, o.logo_url AS logoUrl FROM agency_member_profile m JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = m.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_member_rel tm ON tm.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN agency_team t ON t.id = tm.team_id LEFT JOIN agency_member_role_rel pr ON pr.member_id = m.id AND pr.is_primary = 1 AND pr.role_status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_metrics mm ON mm.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = m.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'AGENT_REAL_NAME' LEFT JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = m.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'AGENT_EDUCATION' WHERE m.id = #{memberId} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' AND o.status = 'ACTIVE' AND o.verification_status = 'APPROVED' AND vrn.status = 'APPROVED' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED' LIMIT 1
